item.abyssworld.abyss_key.desc: Use to travel between the Abyss and the Overworld
item.abyssworld.abyss_key.to_abyss: You have stepped into the Abyss...
item.abyssworld.abyss_key.to_overworld: You have returned to the Overworld
item.abyssworld.abyss_key.missing_dimens: The gate to the Abyss will not open
item.abyssworld.abyss_god_catalyst.desc: Use in the Abyss to summon the Abyss Sovereign
item.abyssworld.abyss_god_catalyst.wrong: Can only be used in the Abyss
item.abyssworld.abyss_god_catalyst.alrea: The Abyss Sovereign is already nearby
item.abyssworld.primordial_relic.hint: Sneak + right-click to change form / right-click to use ability
item.abyssworld.primordial_relic.mode.bl: Overwhelming attack power. Ability grants self-buffs.
item.abyssworld.primordial_relic.mode.sc: Ability unleashes a massive area attack around you.
item.abyssworld.primordial_relic.mode.st: Ability calls down lightning where you look.
block.abyssworld.world_reconstruction_fu: This material is already fully inserted
The reconstruction of the World Law has begun. Enemies from all of the Abyss are coming. Defend the furnace!
Final wave! Godlike enemies have appeared!
Reconstruction in progress... %s seconds remaining. Defend the furnace!
The World Law has been reconstructed. The Primordial Relic is born — everything of the Abyss now dwells within it.
advancements.abyssworld.root.title: Abyss World
advancements.abyssworld.root.description: Obtain Abyss Iron and begin your journey into the Abyss
advancements.abyssworld.enter_abyss.desc: Use the Abyss Key to enter the Abyss World
advancements.abyssworld.layer_core.title: Layer Core
advancements.abyssworld.layer_core.descr: Craft any layer core. Each biome has unique deposits underground
advancements.abyssworld.god_core.title: End of the Abyss
advancements.abyssworld.god_core.descrip: Summon the Abyss Sovereign with the catalyst and obtain the Abyss God Core
advancements.abyssworld.unified_core.des: Craft the Five-Layer Unified Core and the Abyss God Catalyst
advancements.abyssworld.relic.title: King of the Abyss
advancements.abyssworld.relic.descriptio: Insert materials into the Reconstruction Furnace and survive the defense event to complete the Primordial Relic
